boundary: Field normalization only; source detector evidence is not changed or reclassified.

diagnostic_rows.local_quote: In conclusion, while the objections concerning authenticity of motivation and scheduling pressure warrant serious consideration, I maintain that a well-designed compulsory service programme, one that is flexible in implementation and thoughtfully integrated into the curriculum, offers a rare opportunity to cultivate both empathy and civic equity among the next generation.
diagnostic_rows.suggestion: Replace 'civic equity' with 'civic engagement' to better align with common usage in discussions about service programs.
